content.en:
"Apprentice, if you want the space-time chaos supernatural power and the corresponding innate origin things, then the rewards of other resources will be much lower, not because the teacher is unwilling to give you more resources. In fact, those resources are just ordinary things for the teacher, but the reward for the teacher to the apprentice is never biased, and the amount is as much as it should be. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Dao.

"Master, disciple understands!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Okay, after a year, that Chaos Divine Power and the corresponding Innate Origin Thing and other Dao Reward Resources will be sent to the Great Universe. Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Wow!

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor left.

......

After Ye Tian came out of the side hall, he was surrounded by many disciples of the Void Heaven Hall and many Heavenly Monarchs.

"I've seen Daozi!"

One by one, the gods and the heavenly monarchs greeted one after another.

Subsequently, Peng Yu Tianjun and the others wanted to find out from Ye Tian why Ye Tian was able to become a disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, but Ye Tian didn't say anything.

Although it is possible to become a disciple of the Void Heaven by comprehending the Void Heaven Diagram, this is a well-known thing in the Void Heaven lineage.

But there are too few disciples who have comprehended the Void Heaven Diagram, and Ye Tian will naturally not reveal it, and this is one of his hole cards and secrets.

So, Ye Tian just said that he was very talented, and didn't say much else.

......

The Gods and Demons are stationed.

Today's gods and demons have already fused together, although the gods and demons have also found backers, and barely survived in such a large universe era, and the first god lord and the first demon lord have also been promoted to god generals, but due to limited opportunities, the two are still one-star god generals, and they are still ants in the huge universe.

And the news that Ye Tian had become a Dao Ancestor quickly spread to the major forces in the universe, and even the gods and demons heard the news.

"The Ten Thousand Laws God General has actually become the ancestor of the Dao!"

The First God Lord and the First Demon Lord sighed one after another.

Their current knowledge is not as shallow as before, and they naturally understand how Dao Ancestor exists.

In their eyes, the Heavenly Mandate Realm Heavenly Monarch was an unimaginably strong person, and only countless Heavenly Monarchs could give birth to a True Ancestor, and only among a large number of True Ancestors could there be hope of giving birth to a Dao Ancestor.

And it is said that the master of the Ten Thousand Law Divine Generals is an extremely powerful existence among the Dao Ancestors, and even has several Dao Ancestor disciples.

What kind of identity does the Dao Ancestor pass on, to a certain extent, it even surpasses some True Ancestors!

Once upon a time, they regarded Ye Tian as ants, but now the gap between the two sides is getting bigger and bigger, and Ye Tian has regarded them as ants.

There was also some friction between the Protoss and the Terrans, and he also wanted to deal with Ye Tian, but fortunately, the two sides did not come to the point of becoming enemies, otherwise the Protoss would not exist today.

Not only were the gods and demons shocked, but the earth lords and god generals who knew Ye Tian were also extremely shocked.

Although Ye Tian is very strong, they were only slightly weaker than Ye Tian before, and there was not much difference in other aspects.

But now, Ye Tian has become the ancestor of the Dao Ancestor without making a sound, and this identity and status are suddenly at the peak of the Great Universe.

......

The Tower of the God of War.

As soon as the Yunzi Divine Maiden learned of Ye Tian's news, she summoned a Heavenly Monarch, this Heavenly Monarch was a Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, and his strength was extremely powerful, and he was named Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch.

However, this purple-shirted Heavenly Monarch admired by outsiders and with monstrous strength was her guard.

A Heavenly Monarch is a Heavenly Monarch as a guard, which shows the high status of the Yunzi Divine Maiden in the God of War Tower.

In fact, any Dao Ancestor Ancestor's lineage has a guard, and some of the top Dao Ancestor True Ancestors even have those weak True Ancestor guards.

It's just that the True Ancestor can't enter the Great Universe, otherwise, the God of War Tower may really find a True Ancestor to give the Yunzi Divine Maiden as a guard.

"Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch, do you know the situation of that Ten Thousand Law Divine General, why was he suddenly accepted by that Dao Ancestor as a personal disciple? That Dao Ancestor's personal disciple has a very high standard, but he will not accept disciples indiscriminately!"

"Your Highness, I don't know very well, it was rumored that this Ten Thousand Law God would not be able to advance an inch in strength for tens of thousands of years, but now it seems that he is completing a certain assessment, and now that the assessment has been completed, he has been valued by that Dao Ancestor, so as to obtain the status of a personal disciple. As for the specific situation, I'm afraid even those Heavenly Monarchs in the Void Heaven Temple don't know. "Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch said.

"Some of the Dao Ancestor Legends are basically the second batch of arrivals, I came in the first batch, I thought I could take the lead, but I didn't expect that the big universe gave birth to another Dao Ancestor Ancestor, this Dao Ancestor Ancestor may be my competitor!"

The Cloud Purple Priestess muttered.

The purple-shirted Heavenly Monarch suddenly smiled and said: "Your Highness is joking, where can the ordinary Dao Ancestor be compared to His Highness, Dao Ancestor once said that His Highness has a ninety percent hope of achieving Dao Ancestor! With His Highness's talent, coupled with the Dao Body that is about to be cultivated, he is even qualified to participate in this ancestral monument of the great universe!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden shook her head and said: "Don't underestimate any Dao ancestor, I have a great opportunity, and other people naturally have a fate, if you underestimate other people, I don't know when someone will be surpassed." Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch, you should pay more attention to this Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance in the future, and if you have any secret information, notify me immediately. "

"Yes, Your Highness!"

The purple-shirted Heavenly Monarch replied.

----------

After Ye Tian became the ancestor of the Dao, he did not show off everywhere, but soon entered retreat again.

This time, he wanted to cultivate the Void Heaven Dao Body.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

this day.

A reward was delivered to Ye Tian's hand, it was personally sent by Peng Yu Tianjun and the others, they didn't dare to covet the reward of their own disciples, unless they didn't want to live.

After getting the reward, Ye Tian couldn't wait to open it.

A Chaos Divine Power Inheritance, an Innate Origin Thing, and some cultivation resources.

These cultivation resources are basically used to assist in the cultivation of the Xuanxuan Void Technique and the Void Heaven Dao Body, after all, cultivating the Void Heaven Dao Body also requires resources, but there are not many.

What Ye Tian values most at present is the inheritance of the space-time chaos supernatural power, whose name is - space-time shifting technique!

The Space-Time Shifting Technique is a Chaos Divine Power located in the 21st place of the Chaos Divine Power, and this Chaos Divine Power inheritance alone is of immeasurable value, and the Space-Time Heart that assists in the cultivation of the Space-Time Shifting Technique is even more precious, and it is simply a priceless treasure for the Heavenly Monarch who is proficient in time and space.

If it weren't for Ye Tian becoming the ancestor of the Dao Ancestor, he estimated that after countless years of accumulation, he would not want to buy a heart of time and space.

"If you don't practice the space-time transfer technique first, you must first practice the Void Heaven Dao Body, so that if you practice the space-time transfer technique and condense the prototype of the Space-Time Dao, you can engrave two Dao patterns, and the Void Heaven Dao Body will be one step closer. "

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he began to cultivate the Void Heaven Dao Body with all his might.
